prompt: Ultra-realistic, premium studio product photograph of [product_name], perfectly centered on a flawless seamless white infinity background, captured with exceptional precision and commercial-quality lighting. The product is clean, pristine, and free of dust, fingerprints, scratches, or imperfections, showcasing highly detailed textures, realistic materials, and accurate colors. Soft, diffused key lighting combined with balanced fill lighting creates smooth gradients and subtle reflections, while a perfectly natural soft shadow sits directly beneath the product for depth without distraction. Crisp edge definition, true-to-life proportions, and outstanding micro-detail throughout. Shot using a [camera_type] paired with a [lens_type], professional product photography settings, ultra-sharp focus from edge to edge, minimal noise, HDR imaging, realistic reflections, natural contrast, color-calibrated workflow, premium luxury commercial advertising aesthetic, high-end e-commerce catalog quality, magazine-level product presentation, photorealistic rendering, 8K ultra-high resolution, flawless studio perfection.
promptEn: Ultra-realistic, premium studio product photograph of [product_name], perfectly centered on a flawless seamless white infinity background, captured with exceptional precision and commercial-quality lighting. The product is clean, pristine, and free of dust, fingerprints, scratches, or imperfections, showcasing highly detailed textures, realistic materials, and accurate colors. Soft, diffused key lighting combined with balanced fill lighting creates smooth gradients and subtle reflections, while a perfectly natural soft shadow sits directly beneath the product for depth without distraction. Crisp edge definition, true-to-life proportions, and outstanding micro-detail throughout. Shot using a [camera_type] paired with a [lens_type], professional product photography settings, ultra-sharp focus from edge to edge, minimal noise, HDR imaging, realistic reflections, natural contrast, color-calibrated workflow, premium luxury commercial advertising aesthetic, high-end e-commerce catalog quality, magazine-level product presentation, photorealistic rendering, 8K ultra-high resolution, flawless studio perfection.
promptZh: 超写实、高端摄影棚产品照片，主体为 [product_name]，完美居中于无瑕的无缝白色无限背景之上，以卓越的精度和商业级照明拍摄。产品洁净、崭新，无灰尘、指纹、划痕或瑕疵，展现出高度细腻的纹理、逼真的材质和准确的色彩。柔和的漫射主光结合平衡的补光，营造出平滑的渐变和微妙的反射，产品下方带有极其自然的柔和阴影，在不干扰视觉的情况下增加深度。边缘清晰，比例真实，整体呈现出色的微观细节。使用 [camera_type] 搭配 [lens_type] 拍摄，采用专业产品摄影设置，全画面超锐利对焦，极低噪点，HDR 成像，逼真反射，自然对比度，色彩校准工作流，高端奢华商业广告美学，高端电商目录品质，杂志级产品展示，照片级真实渲染，8K 超高分辨率，完美的摄影棚级效果。
